task.title: Wait for the client before tracking
task.spec: Initialize the installed analytics client and emit the event only after it becomes ready.
constraints: The event is emitted once after readiness and the client is cleaned up.

task.title: Use the installed client API
task.spec: Integrate the installed package without relying on APIs introduced in a newer release.
constraints: Every package symbol is supported by the locked version.

task.title: Preserve button behavior
task.spec: Wrap the existing button without dropping its click and accessibility properties.
constraints: Click and aria-label props reach the rendered button.

task.title: Record successful jobs
task.spec: Emit the canonical completion metric through the repository's real metrics sink.
constraints: One completion metric is emitted with the job identity.

task.title: Expose the health handler
task.spec: Add and register the requested health route in the existing router.
constraints: GET /health/codegen returns the strict response schema.

task.title: Place the action in the toolbar
task.spec: Render the action inside the existing primary toolbar at the requested position.
constraints: The action is visually inside the toolbar after the title.

task.title: Preserve external CI uncertainty
task.spec: Represent a repository with no external checks as unverified rather than passed.
constraints: No checks settles as unverified_external_ci and never as passed.

task.title: Classify an infrastructure timeout
task.spec: Restore the timeout classifier so unavailable runner infrastructure requests a GitHub-native rerun instead of a product-code repair.
constraints: The failure is classified for a GitHub-native rerun.
